c74object.name: dk.classmatch
c74object.digest: Finds nearest class based on descriptor input
c74object.description: The dk.classmatch object will find the nearest match in a set of pre-trained classes or clusters.
c74object.discussion:
If you want to learn more about the underlying algorithms have a look at this article:
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/knnclassifier

inlet.description: Takes incoming buffer~ name to find the nearest class match. Also takes the messages for object control.

outlet.description: The nearest match in the pre-trained classifier.
Dict output for displaying on an dk.plotter.

objarg.name: default
objarg.digest: JSON file to load by default
objarg.description: JSON file to load by default.

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dumps classifier summary out the right-most outlet
method.description: Dump class names, amount of classes, class means (as dict) out of the right-most outlet.

method.name: print
method.digest: Print classifier info to Max console
method.description: Prints a summary of the classifier and trained classes to the Max console.

method.name: read
method.description: Reads a pre-trained classifier directly from a relative or absolute path. With no additional argument, a file dialog will appear to choose a .json file.

attribute.name: classifier
attribute.digest: What type of classifier to use
attribute.description: What type of classifier to use. Can be 'knn' (K-nearest neighbor using a k-d tree) or 'mlp' (multi-layer perceptron neural network).

attribute.name: output
attribute.digest: Select how the class is reported
attribute.description: Select how the class is reported. can be class (symbol), index (int), or normalized (float).
